# DomainStates Reference

**Status:** REMOVED
**Page type:** N/A
**Reader's job:** N/A — this page does not exist. The reader's job (look up which state class maps to which HA domain) is served by the auto-generated API reference for `hassette.models.states`.

## Rationale

A hand-written domain-to-class reference table duplicates what mkdocstrings generates from source. The generated reference stays current as domains are added; a hand-written table rots. The States overview page links to the API reference for the full inventory and shows 2-3 inline examples for orientation.
